svg.text: AI flight booking agent — end-to-end flow

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What problem does the user face before this tool?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI scrape multiple platforms simultaneously?')
sendPrompt('How does the comparison engine rank flights?')
sendPrompt('What does the flight selection UI look like?')
sendPrompt('How does the agent handle login and session management?')
sendPrompt('What passenger details does the AI auto-fill?')
sendPrompt('What happens at the payment handoff stage?')
sendPrompt('Why does the user pay manually instead of the AI?')
sendPrompt('What confirmation does the user receive?')

g.text: Does MMT + Goibibo + Ixigo auto-fill end-to-end

svg.text: ~35 minutes of manual work → under 90 seconds
